title: (NO ADS) 25 Teachings of Diogenes the Cynic for Deep Sleep
description:
Discover how Diogenes found freedom in a barrel. This sleep story explores his radical wisdom: reject convention, live simply, find peace in authenticity.

✦ Cynic philosophy: freedom through radical simplicity
✦ Virtue over status: embrace authenticity and nature
✦ Meditative narration with ambient soundscape for sleep

Subscribe and hit 🔔 for new sleep stories every day.

Gentle narration with ambient sounds for deep philosophical sleep.
